$comment: Project-scoped MCP servers for THIS repo. Merged with the user-level servers in
~/.claude.json; a same-named server here wins, which is how this repo gets its own
Omnigraph graph instead of the shared globals graph.
Per-project graph isolation: `omnigraph` is pinned to the `agent-skills` graph. A
bridge serves exactly one graph (no tool takes a graph argument), so reading the
global-scope Preferences in `memory` needs the second `omnigraph-globals` server.
Treat that one as read-only. See skills/structured-memory/SKILL.md.
OMNIGRAPH_TOKEN is read from the environment and must never be written here (this
file is tracked). Set it once per machine, e.g. on Windows:
or export it from infra/mcp-servers/.env.shared before launching your agent.
